review_title: Keeps Me Organized and On Track as a Solo Worker
description: It's been great overall! It's so powerful, that you have to "step" into it. I'm looking forward to exploring it's higher features.
author: Julie T.
pros: I helps me to schedule my workload, to see my upcoming deadlines, and keep notes if I have to ask my client anything.
cons: I can't think of anything that I dislike! I'm only using the basic features at this time. I'm looking to learn more and upgrade to the higher version.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Financial Cents Brings Peace of Mind to My Firm
author: Chelsey K G.
pros: Financial Cents has been a game-changer for my bookkeeping firm. Before using it, keeping track of client deadlines and workflows felt overwhelming. Now, everything is in one place—projects, recurring tasks, and client communications—so nothing falls through the cracks. What I love most is how easy it is to set up and use. The recurring workflows save me hours every month, and the dashboard makes it simple to see exactly what needs to get done. I also appreciate how client information, documents, and notes are stored in one place, which cuts down on back-and-forth and keeps my team on the same page. The support team is excellent, too. They’re quick to respond and genuinely listen to feedback, constantly improving the platform. It feels like the software was designed specifically for bookkeepers and accountants, which makes a big difference compared to generic project management tools. Since moving to Financial Cents, I feel more organized, confident, and less stressed about deadlines. It’s truly helped me scale my firm and free up mental space to focus on serving clients and growing the business.
cons: I wish there were more options for customization in dashboards and reporting to better fit my firm’s unique workflows.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Organized Tasks
author: Kyle C.
pros: Financial Cents has transformed the way I manage client tasks. The intuitive dashboard allows me to easily assign, track, and prioritize tasks for each client. The ability to set due dates and receive reminders ensures that nothing falls through the cracks. This has streamlined my workflow, making it easier to stay on top of all client engagements.
cons: Setup can be tricky and time consuming.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great tool for a solo practice.
description: My overall experience with Financial Cents has been fantastic. As a solo practitioner, I wear every hat in the business, and I used to waste so much time chasing down documents and managing emails. Financial Cents solved that without breaking the bank. The setup was quick, and having the Solo Plan meant I didn't have to pay for seats I didn't need. The client portal is the standout feature for me—it makes me look much more professional to my clients and keeps everything secure. Between the automated reminders and the easy document sharing, it feels like I hired a virtual assistant for a fraction of the cost.
author: Nick I.
pros: The Solo Plan is an ideal solution for a single-person practice like mine. It fits my budget perfectly without sacrificing functionality. It provides everything I need, including secure document sharing, a dedicated client portal, and helpful automation features.
cons: would have liked e-sginature in the solo plan but this is not a dealbreaker. the price is cheap enough that it is a win/win if i want to have a client portal.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great Task/Time tracking for your money
description: Overall, Financial Cents has been much better for us than any of the other software programs we have tried for task management and time tracking. We do not currently use the billing side but everything looks pretty easy, and hopefully someday they'll have a real app that works as good as the website.
author: Beth S.
pros: Financial Cents is very easy to use, everyone in our firm was able to figure out what they need. The reporting contains everything we need and is easy to access. The templates are great, and its also very easy to customize whatever we need. The different pipeline views are helpful as we can each customize it to what works best for us so nothing slips thru the cracks. The time tracking ability to have multiple timers that you can switch between and add notes as you're working is also very helpful. The client task reminders and upload portal are great and intuitive for our clients.
cons: Using Financial Cents on a mobile device is not nearly as nice as using it on a computer. Accessing client uploads is not intuitive on our end, and the client chat does not always notify us or the client, especially if a project is already closed.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Why Financial Cents Works Well For Me
description: Overall I like Financial Cents very much and am very happy plus love the idea that I can grow with this app.
author: Gabrielle F.
pros: It's the best practice management app for my needs since it focuses on workflows and is flexible and easy to use to stay on track and on top of deadlines. It helps me get the needed info from my clients as well in a way that is convenient for everyone. Customer support is very good too and they are always working on improving the app.
cons: My only concern is that it has now become a very robust application and with all the bells and whistles that also makes it more complicated. I do not use all the features, but that said, the help files are good so I can usually find what I need on my own if I am expanding to use a new feature that I'm unfamiliar with.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Great, but not quite Perfect
description: It's been a great product; easy to implement and get my users on board using it. I still need to get everyone to link their emails, but baby steps.
author: Eden W.
pros: It's easy to use, great for tracking project status, and it's nice to be able to link emails to specific projects for collaboration.
cons: I wish they would focus on making the project management portion perfect before adding new features like invoicing and proposals.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Great value for reliable workflow tool - closest there is to a all-in-one tool currently
author: João C.
pros: Financial Cents gives us peace of mind with strong security for sharing and requesting documents from clients, while offering great value for money. Their customer support is responsive and helpful, and the platform makes project collaboration super easy being possible to easily assign task and projects and automate certain steps on the workflow. Document management and payment processing are easy to handle, the possibility of sending proposals and engagelment letters with great flexibility made us cancel our ignition subscription which was no longer needed. The templates took us a while to set up but now they save us a lot of time. Data import and custom forms also work but could be improved.
cons: The transition from Trello boards and spreadsheet to FC had to be made manually and that was a cosiderable investment of time in setting everything up, once done it was worth it though.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great tool but just wasn’t right for us
description: Overall, I think Financial Cents is a great piece of software to help small businesses manage clients, workflow, team work and gave clarity over where work was up to.
author: Penny M.
pros: Loved the inbox feature, I think this would have helped with productivity. I loved how the clients were set up and connected and how the jobs against clients gave clarity over the workflow
cons: Cost. It was just too expensive for a small practice. There really wasn’t anything else I didn’t like
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great for small CPA firms with limited resource to start up a capable CRM.
description: Easy to navigate and learn, a lot of potential with workflows that I'll tap into more and more as I use it.
author: Scott G.
pros: I like the simplicity of getting started with it combined with having the core features all firms need in a CRM/Practice management (billing, proposals, client information, and projects).
cons: Some key features are little lack luster. I.e. billing options when creating proposals are limited. The most notable one missing for the proposals is to auto-bill on project(s) completion. The integration with adobe sign doesn't allow clients to download a copy of what they signed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Financial-Cents has been a game-changer for our firm
description: Financial-Cents has been a game changer for our firm. It helps our team stay organized and makes it easy to stay on top of all the work we need to do. We’ve set it up so that each project has clear, step-by-step workflows, which makes everything much easier to follow. One of my favorite features is the automation. We can automatically send updates to clients when certain steps of a project are complete, which saves us time and keeps clients in the loop. The client tasks feature is also fantastic. Our clients get a clear checklist of what we need from them, with built-in reminders. For recurring requests each month, we’ve automated those too. Our clients love how smooth and straightforward the process feels. The chat feature works beautifully for client communication, and I really appreciate the customization options that allow us to tailor the system to fit our firm’s needs. On top of that, the team behind Financial-Cents genuinely listens to their users. They’re constantly adding new features and improvements based on feedback. Their monthly “feature recap” meetings are amazing as well because they share updates and also take the time to answer questions and hear our opinions live. Overall, Financial-Cents has improved our organization, client communication, and workflow efficiency tremendously. I would highly recommend it to any firm looking for smoother processes and stronger client relationships.
author: Cindy S.
pros: Organized workflows – Projects set up with clear, step-by-step processes. Automations – Automatically send client updates when project steps are completed. Client tasks – Clients receive checklists, reminders, and recurring monthly requests. Client chat – Smooth, built-in communication with clients. Customization – Flexible setup tailored to our needs. Recats - links with QBO to pull uncategorized transactions and request info from clients. User-focused development – Regularly adds features and improvements based on feedback. Feature recap meetings – Monthly live sessions to share updates, answer questions, and gather user opinions.
cons: File storage - you cannot open files in native apps (Excel, Adobe) without downloading them first. They are continually making improvements so I'm hoping they'll add this feature soon!
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Game Changer
description: Financial Cents, despite the few areas it's lacking, has been a game changing experience for me. It's user friendly with a clean layout, detailed yet easy to understand help section and a support team that is quick to respond and pleasant to interact with when there are times when issues arise.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: There are many things I love about Financial Cents. Client communication is seamless, automated task reminders are easy to set, invoicing features all in one portal for my clients, secure document storage and requests. I also love how Financial Cents collaborates with their own clients (us bookkeepers and accountants) in regards to feedback and new features. They regularly update their roadmap and inquire when new features are being considered so they can build the best product for their audience.
cons: There are a few features I wish FC had that other platforms do- namely, it's lacking comprehensive month-end closing features (such as what is found in Keeper) and the invoicing is great, however lacks progress billing and payment plans. It also only integrates with QuickBooks Online for their ReCats feature which means for clients using other accounting software such as Xero, additional tech is needed to perform the same task increasing overhead costs.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: User friendly system, forward-thinking
description: I am still a new user and we have not fully implemented for our whole team yet, but I see how much this system will change the game for us in terms of productivity and effective communication.
author: Megan C.
pros: Very user friendly platform, client import is seamless, and appreciate the options for automations on the project templates, and access to other users templates to get ideas. Our rep has also been very helpful so far.
cons: It would be better if there was an app or better way to receive and make updates via phone instead of just on the internet browser. I also would like a file system that allowed viewing of files outside of just PDFs within the system without having to download.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bookkeeper ONE Application Tool
description: Initial setup was easy. I like that there are videos to show you step-by-step how to do certain tasks. I like that there are tips and tricks offered every so often!
author: TANYA C.
pros: This application is certainly geared towards bookkeepers & accountants. Each component in this application has been thoroughly thought out to best suit the intricate needs of a day-today, month-to month tasks. The capability to effortlessly send clients requests to supplying client with reports at the client of a button, is worth its weight in gold. My clients like that the application has superb security measures in place. Clients also like the idea of not having to physically bring documents to me, or have multiple phones from me when I need information. I have utilized several apps, plus email & text to run my bookkeeping business. Although those tools worked, Financial Cents has EVERYTHING you need in ONE application.
cons: I have used FC for a while. I cannot think of anything that I dislike at this time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great for Project & Task Management
author: Raegan D.
pros: Financial Cents has been a game changer for keeping me and my team on task and all on the same page. It allows us to schedule recurring projects throughout the month vs all at EOM. I love that we can leave comments so we all know the status or roadblocks for each open project. I couldn't run my firm so efficiently without Financial Cents! It's super user friendly and easy to integrate with QBO. May favorite feature may be the Client Vault where you can store login credentials, account numbers, and direct links to financial sites.
cons: No dislikes; I do wish it was a little more affordable for us smaller firms though. However, I like that you can pay by the year to receive a small discount.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: An All-in-One Solution for Accounting Workflows
description: Financial Cents has been a valuable tool for managing our bookkeeping and accounting workflows. It has simplified collaboration, improved task visibility, and helped ensure deadlines are met. While there’s room for growth, the team is highly responsive to feedback, and I’m happy with the direction the product is going. It’s a great solution for accounting firms looking for a balance between usability and powerful workflow management.
author: Adam J.
pros: Financial Cents has an intuitive interface that makes it easy to track both projects and tasks in one place. The onboarding process is smooth, and I appreciate that all features are included in one transparent price—no hidden costs or add-ons. The platform is also evolving in the right direction, striking a balance between flexibility for unique workflows and simplicity for team adoption.
cons: As a growing platform, some features are still in development. For example, online billing for Canadian users isn’t available yet, which would make managing payments much more convenient. Additionally, while the system is flexible, there are still areas where customization options could be expanded to better fit different firm structures.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Still Love FC, but.........
description: Still very positive, but the inability to open excel and Word documents in the program is problematic.
author: Patti S.
pros: Intuitive layout, customizing is easy, interaction with and requests for clients very effective-even with the least tech savvy client
cons: When needing to open any other type of document other than a pdf, the document opens as if it were a pdf or not at all. Excel files open as a pdf meaning that I can 't see all of the information in a logical fashion. Word and Excel docs have to be downloaded out of program to be viewed.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Game changer for my bookkeeping biz!
description: My overall experience has been great. If I need help they are super helpful and always improving their app.
author: Cathleen D.
pros: I loved the ease of getting started using this app. The templates available to uuse and customize for your particular needs are great. This app has been a game changer for my firm.
cons: I would like the documents my clients upload to be front and center. Other than that I don't have any complaints.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Best software for managing an accounting company
description: They have excellent customer service and are very responsive to feedback. I tested out a variety of different platforms and this is the one that has been the easiest to setup and to use consistently.
author: Morgan S.
pros: I like that it has helped me become more organized and track my time better. I enjoy the easy to use templates and how it has made my job a lot more streamlined.
cons: I would like a better idea of the UI that my client is seeing - it would be nice to be cc'ed on emails that go out to them (this might be a feature and I just haven't figured out how to turn it on yet).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: After years of looking for the perfect solution to my organization needs I have found a home!
description: I love Financial Cents and I use it every day. The features of FC have checked almost all of the boxes that I need to run my business, and with the ability to integrate the platform with Zappier, I think I can check the rest of the boxes!
author: Richard R.
pros: QBO integration and client tasks reminders are a game changer! I love the dashboard and the email and calendar integration is a huge help. I have Financial Cents as the home page on my Google Workspace account so I know exactly where to start my day.
cons: I wish that Financial Cents had more marketing and client relationship management capabilities. I have come to depend on it so much that I don't want to have to add another platform to my tech stack for CRM.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Would recommend!
description: Would recommend - did the trial and used it enough that I had to get the subscription. It was an easy way to store client information in one place without creating extra spreadsheets, files, or systems to be able to securely keep myself organized.
author: Alexis J.
pros: The program makes an easy to use CRM system for my clients to be able to store their files, easily access information, compile notes, create to do lists, and share files between clients and myself securely.
cons: I don't need all the functionality on here so it is a bit pricey but the functions I do use have been worth it to keep organized.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quick to learn
description: Good! Easy to navigate, makes financial management tasks more efficient and straightforward. Easy to teach new employees to use
author: Faith W.
pros: Easy to navigate and has a decent database search through tagging projects. Clients are highly customizable
cons: The only issue I have is its dependance on internet access. If there were an option to make changes that later sync to the cloud that'd be great.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Financial Cents keeps my entire practice organized and running smoothly
description: Financial Cents keeps my entire practice organized and running smoothly by having all client info, workflows, and tasks in one convenient place.
author: Elisabeth D.
pros: I absolutely love using Financial Cents for my practice! Having everything in one place—from client info to workflows and task management—makes running my business so much smoother. It keeps me organized, saves me time, and ensures nothing falls through the cracks. Honestly, I don’t know how I managed without it!
cons: One con of Financial Cents is that it has so many features that it can take time to learn and fully implement them all.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great platform
description: My overall experience with Financial Cents has been excellent. The platform is easy to use and keeps us organized, improves efficiency, and saves us valuable time. The workflow tools and client portal make managing client work seamless, and I have peace of mind knowing nothing slips through the cracks.
author: Sylvia M.
pros: What I like most about Financial Cents is that it keeps client data safe. It’s affordable, packed with useful features, and saves me both time and stress. The customer support team is excellent, and I also really value the easy payment processing, which makes billing clients simple and efficient.
cons: There's nothing that I liked least about Financial Cents. Everything works well for us, and it meets exactly what we were looking for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Financial Cents - Practical, Reliable, Gets the Job Done
description: Overall, Financial Cents is solid. It keeps me organized, helps me stay accountable to client work, and makes the day-to-day less chaotic. The projects and tasks do exactly what they’re supposed to. That said, it doesn’t feel groundbreaking — it feels like the basics done well. And sometimes, that’s all you really need: something that actually works instead of a million shiny features you never use.
author: Grazielle A.
pros: I’m obsessed with how Financial Cents lets me stay on top of client work. The Projects and task features make it super clear, super simple, and honestly—it just keeps me moving. If you care about actually getting sht done for your clients, this is the kind of system that works.
cons: The Projects and task features in Financial Cents get the job done. They’re clean, practical, and help me stay organized with clients. But honestly, it doesn’t feel innovative — more like table stakes. Still, it works, and sometimes execution beats flashy features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
